name: Bio Lotusmon

signature_move.name: Seven's Fantasia
signature_move.description: Fires a seven-colored aura from its flower-ended staff that makes the opponent lose their fighting spirit.

description: Digimon Analyzer ⇨ Japanese Bio Lotusmon A Bio-Hybrid that is the fusion of human and Digimon. Its Special Move is Seven's Fantasia . Its seven-colored aura will make you lose your fighting spirit! — Digimon Savers: "Showdown Between Geniuses! Thoma vs Nanami" Digimon Savers ⇨ English バイオロトスモン バイオロトスモン：人間とデジモンが融合したバイオハイブリッド体だ。必殺技は セブンズファンタジア 。七色のオーラが戦意を喪失させるぞ。 — デジモンセイバーズ 「天才対決！トーマVSナナミ」 デジモンセイバーズ ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ Japanese A Bio Digimon that has the appearance of a lotus flower. By predicting Thoma 's tactics, it displayed reaction rates surpassing even Mirage Gaogamon . It makes the opponent lose their fighting spirit with " Seven's Fantasia ", which releases a seven-colored aura. Digimon Series Memorial Book: Digimon Animation Chronicle ⇨ English 蓮の花の姿をしたバイオデジモン。トーマの作戦を予測し、ミラージュガオガモンをも上回る反応速度を見せた。七色のオーラを放つ「 セブンズファンタジア 」で敵の戦意を喪失させる。 デジモンシリーズ メモリアルブック デジモンアニメーションクロニクル ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
